positive: A symmetrical, highly intricate botanical-celestial motif illustration featuring a central arrangement of stylized exotic flora (peonies, ferns, swirling vines) perfectly integrated with celestial elements (multiple crescent moons, stylized constellations, cosmic dust trails). The style should emulate a luxurious blend of Art Nouveau etching and detailed scientific illustration, designed with high contrast and strong, defined silhouettes. Utilize a sophisticated, limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, metallic gold, and off-white, ensuring sharp edges and flat areas of color for optimal textile printing. The composition must be perfectly centered, balanced, and scalable, suitable for an apparel graphic print.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, low quality, cropped, poorly drawn, deformed, bad anatomy, artifact, noise, jpeg artifacts, blurry background
